description_long: This is a modern, rectangular three-story house with a flat roof and a brick exterior. Large, vertically oriented windows are distributed across all visible facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house features a paved driveway and two manicured trees on small grass plots. The backyard includes a fenced-in area with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, and a small swimming pool, surrounded by additional landscaping. The side and rear facades are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern three-story brick house with large vertical windows, a flat roof, and a backyard featuring a deck and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two trees, and a paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the brick wall, driveway extension, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, wooden deck, outdoor furniture, and swimming pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows, backyard fence, and landscaping visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat door, no porch, flanked by two trees and a paved driveway
